ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "record_num" TEXT /* Record number assigned to the document */,
  "nara_release_date" TEXT /* Date the document was released by the National Archives and Records Administration (NARA) */,
  "formerly_withheld" TEXT /* Indicates if the document was formerly withheld, and if so, in part or in full */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Agency of origin (e.g., CIA, FBI) */,
  "doc_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., PAPER - TEXTUAL DOCUMENT) */,
  "file_num" TEXT /* File number assigned to the document */,
  "to_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient of the document */,
  "from_name" TEXT /* Name of the sender of the document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "num_pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the document */,
  "originator" TEXT /* Originator of the document */,
  "record_series" TEXT /* Record series to which the document belongs */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the document was last reviewed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the document */,
  "pages_released" INTEGER /* Number of pages released in the document */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the document */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the document */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the document was last modified */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Security classification of the document */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for search and filtering */,
  "release_status" TEXT /* Current release status of the document */,
  "redacted_pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages that have been redacted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_agency FOREIGN KEY ("agency") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_doc_type FOREIGN KEY ("doc_type") REFERENCES doc_types ("doc_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agency */,
  "agency_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agency */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doc_types" (
  "doc_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "doc_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type (e.g., PAPER - TEXTUAL DOCUMENT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* Common file extension for the document type */,
  "max_size" INTEGER /* Maximum allowed file size for the document type in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agency staff, researcher, public) */,
  "user_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division within the agency */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the document was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the document */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_history" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the reviewer */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes from the reviewer */,
  "review_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the review process in days */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., initial, follow-up) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_history_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_history_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
